title: Bolsius - True Joy - Scented Candle with Cork Lid - Burgundy - Floral Blessings - Burn time: 21 Hours - with Natural Extracts - with Natural Vegetable Wax
features: Make time for yourself with our Bolsius True Joy Floral Blessings Scented Candle and discover this irresistible wellness scent of a garden full of fragrant flowers that helps you relax. This candle delivers the purest fragrance diffusion for up to 21 hours, thanks to our ScentFusion technology. This technology is a unique combination of a sophisticated fragrance blend, the purest wax and an optimal wick to ensure the perfect diffusion of the fragrance.

Floral Blessings is a cheerful scent of orange blossom, jasmine, rose and juicy orange on a musk base. Discover this irresistible wellness scent of a garden full of fragrant flowers that helps you relax!

Our ScentFusion technology is a unique combination of a sophisticated fragrance blend, the purest wax and an optimal wick to ensure a perfect olfactory experience. Made with love for people and the planet. With 25% plant-based wax and without palm oil.

Be enchanted by True Joy's rich scents, capturing the beauty of nature through vibrant colors, captivating shapes and alluring fragrances. Treat yourself to a unique blend of our fragrances, elegantly presented - a perfect gift for everyone. Designed with ScentFusion technology, we guarantee the purest fragrance and the release of the cleanest fragrance.

Since 1870, Bolsius has been producing high-quality candles and fragrances with which you create an atmosphere of comfort and well-being in your home. We do it with passion, know-how and respect for people and the planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candle light and fragrances that awaken your senses. So that every moment is special. For you and everyone around you.
description: From the manufacturer Bolsius - True Joy The True Joy collection is inspired by the rich fragrances of nature.
